name: Zov's Golden Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup golden (or red) lentils, rinsed well
2 tablespoons vegetable oil, up to 4 tablespoons
1 small bunch Italian parsley, Optional garnish
recipeInstructions:
In a large pot or Dutch oven, combine lentils, rice and 4 cups of water. Bring to a boil gently for about 15 minutes.
In a skillet, sauté carrots, onion, and celery in oil for 7 minutes or until onions are transparent; add to lentil mixture, combining well.
Add broth, remaining 4 cups of water and seasonings. Stir constantly and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer about 20 minutes. Season to taste with salt.
Advance preparation: Soup can be prepared up to 2 days before serving and refrigerated, airtight. Reheat slowly, stirring frequently to prevent scorching.
Serve warm.
Yield: Makes 10-12 servings.
